summary: Independent QA R2 re-reviewed the formatting-only fix for M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001. The previous blocker is resolved: the targeted Prettier check over packages/sim-ai and the new sim-runner CLI now passes, the fix is formatting-only for packages/sim-ai/src/m5-multiyear-ai-run.ts, behavior hashes remain unchanged, and no new forbidden scope or determinism risk was found. The previously accepted limitations remain explicit: live 730-day continuation records zero accepted AI commands and all live decisions are no-action, while deterministic probes provide accepted withdraw and target-change command-path evidence.

decisions: Accept R2. The previous QA blocker was formatting-only and is now fixed with passing targeted Prettier evidence.
No additional production behavior change is requested. The formatted file continues to produce the same M5 multi-year runner hashes reported before the fix.
The pnpm-lock.yaml allowed-path correction remains accepted as workspace-local @monsoon/sim-ai representation with no external dependency.

The live no-action-only limitation remains accepted for this task because it is explicit, bounded, deterministic, and backed by separate deterministic command-path probes; it should remain visible in later M5 gate evidence.

risks.risk: Live continuation still records AI accepted commands: 0 and AI no-action decisions: 730. This is accepted only as an explicit validation limitation, not evidence of active long-run AI strategy.

Root pnpm format:check still does not cover packages/sim-ai or apps/sim-runner/src, and root lint still misses apps/sim-runner/src. The targeted checks passed for this task; lead should track broader root-glob coverage as a process follow-up if desired.

requested_action: Proceed with lead integration gates for M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001. Do not mark M5 formal passage; this is only task-level QA acceptance.
